name: Herbed Meat Loaf
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons fresh basil or 1 tablespoon dried basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Combine all ingredients except the bacon slices.
3. Shape the mixture into an oval loaf.
4. Place the loaf on a rack in a baking pan or pie plate.
5. Top the loaf with the bacon slices.
6. Bake for one and one-half hours.
7. Serve with mushroom sauce, brown gravy, or tomato sauce. Enjoy!
